'''âsh-zh-th-n''' ('''kashazhthenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbarricade|unbarricade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbarricade|unbarricade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-zh-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashazhthenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazhthenoko|thishazhthenoko]] || [[word:jishazhthenoko|jishazhthenoko]] || [[word:shishazhthenoko|shishazhthenoko]] || [[word:kishazhthenoko|kishazhthenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushazhthenoko|thuthushazhthenoko]] || [[word:jujushazhthenoko|jujushazhthenoko]] || [[word:shushushazhthenoko|shushushazhthenoko]] || [[word:kukushazhthenoko|kukushazhthenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushazhthenoko|thushazhthenoko]] || [[word:jushazhthenoko|jushazhthenoko]] || [[word:shushazhthenoko|shushazhthenoko]] || [[word:kushazhthenoko|kushazhthenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshazhthenoko|thoshazhthenoko]] || [[word:joshazhthenoko|joshazhthenoko]] || [[word:shoshazhthenoko|shoshazhthenoko]] || [[word:koshazhthenoko|koshazhthenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshazhthenoko|thĂŠshazhthenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshazhthenoko|jĂŠshazhthenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshazhthenoko|shĂŠshazhthenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshazhthenoko|kĂŠshazhthenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashazhthenoko|thathashazhthenoko]] || [[word:jajashazhthenoko|jajashazhthenoko]] || [[word:shashashazhthenoko|shashashazhthenoko]] || [[word:kakashazhthenoko|kakashazhthenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashazhthenoko|thashazhthenoko]] || [[word:jashazhthenoko|jashazhthenoko]] || [[word:shashazhthenoko|shashazhthenoko]] || [[word:kashazhthenoko|kashazhthenoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashazhthenithi|shashazhthenithi]] || [[word:shashazhtheniji|shashazhtheniji]] || [[word:shashazhthenishi|shashazhthenishi]] || [[word:shashazhtheniki|shashazhtheniki]]
